feedback.text: The proposal presented is very interesting but can also be extended to the field of video games, there is a huge amount of games that are sold to the consumer and become inaccessible once the official media of the publisher ends. I have several titles to which I unfortunately no longer have access when the product has been sold to me and although I understand that for products that require constant internet access, there should be a way for me to benefit from my purchase outside a connection with a server that can be closed at any time.
